author: y4rr
content:
Landed the classification block; ranking/clustering split to #617.

## What landed in \`ferrotorch-ml/src/metrics.rs\`

### New public API (10 metrics)
- \`precision_score(y_true, y_pred, average)\` — binary / macro / micro / weighted
- \`recall_score(y_true, y_pred, average)\`
- \`f1_score(y_true, y_pred, average)\`
- \`roc_auc_score(y_true, y_score)\` — binary, score-typed
- \`log_loss(y_true, y_prob)\` — multi-class, expects \`[N, K]\` 2-D \`y_prob\`
- \`confusion_matrix(y_true, y_pred) -> Vec<Vec<usize>>\`
- \`hamming_loss(y_true, y_pred)\`
- \`balanced_accuracy_score(y_true, y_pred, adjusted)\`
- \`matthews_corrcoef(y_true, y_pred)\`
- \`cohen_kappa_score(y_true, y_pred)\`

### Re-exports
- \`Average\` enum from \`ferrolearn_metrics::classification\` for the multi-class averaging strategy

### Helper
- \`tensor_to_array1_f64\` — private adapter for score-typed inputs (ROC-AUC needs Array1<f64>, not generic T)

## Tests (10 new in \`metrics::tests\`)
- \`precision_binary_perfect\` — all-correct ⇒ precision = 1
- \`recall_binary_partial\` — 1 of 2 positives caught ⇒ recall = 0.5
- \`f1_binary_harmonic_mean\` — harmonic mean of p=1.0 and r=0.5 ⇒ F1 = 2/3
- \`confusion_matrix_binary\` — 2×2 layout for known label/pred sequence
- \`hamming_loss_partial\` — 1 mismatch / 4 ⇒ 0.25
- \`balanced_accuracy_balanced_classes\` — perfect → 1.0
- \`matthews_corrcoef_perfect_is_one\` and \`cohen_kappa_perfect_is_one\` — agreement metrics ⇒ 1.0
- \`roc_auc_perfect_separation\` — clean class boundary ⇒ AUC = 1.0
- \`log_loss_known_value\` — closed-form check (correct class probability 0.9 → -ln(0.9))
- \`log_loss_rejects_1d_y_prob\` — shape error path

38 ml metric tests pass total (10 new + 28 existing). \`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: zero regressions.

## Out of scope → #617
- Ranking: \`dcg_score\`, \`ndcg_score\`, \`coverage_error\`, \`label_ranking_average_precision_score\`, \`label_ranking_loss\`
- Clustering: \`silhouette_score\` / \`silhouette_samples\`, \`adjusted_rand_score\`, \`adjusted_mutual_info\`, \`davies_bouldin_score\`
- Adapter additions for \`Array1<isize>\` and \`Array2<f64>\` / \`Array2<usize>\`
